close_reason: Changed 4 unnested or-patterns to nested form in matches\! macros
description:
secretx-core/src/lib.rs:255 (json_skip_ws), 203 (after-value validation in extract_field), 511, 513 (json_skip_number): patterns of the form

    matches!(chars.peek(), Some(' ') | Some('\t') | Some('\n') | Some('\r'))

are caught by clippy::unnested_or_patterns and should be written

    matches!(chars.peek(), Some(' ' | '\t' | '\n' | '\r'))

The byte-version skip_ws_b at lib.rs:674 has the same shape. Apply consistently in both scanners.

P2 because it's purely cosmetic but the byte/char divergence is exactly the kind of drift the maintenance contract comment at lib.rs:138-142 says to avoid.
title: json_skip_ws and others use unnested or-patterns inside matches!
